name: Education Loan EMI Calculator
description: Plan education loan payments with interest and tenure.

example.explanation: Education loans often have longer tenures; for ₹10,00,000 at 10% over 10 years, EMI is ₹13,228.08.

faqs.question: What is a moratorium period?
faqs.answer: It is a period during which you may not have to pay principal, but interest can still accrue.

faqs.question: Can interest be capitalized?
faqs.answer: Some lenders add accrued interest to the principal, which increases EMI.

faqs.question: Are education loans tax-deductible?
faqs.answer: Interest on education loans can qualify for tax deduction under Section 80E of the Income Tax Act.
